ValidationRule.description: Business Vertical and No of Units are mandatory from Negotiation stage onwards.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Negotiation'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Quote Acceptance'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Funds (Negotiation)'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Advance Paid'), ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won') ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Buisness_Vertical__c, ''), ISBLANK(No_of_Units__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Business Vertical and No of Units are required from the Negotiation stage onwards.
